Index.title: Tariq ila Al-Jannah | Your Daily Muslim Companion
Index.description: A comprehensive Islamic application featuring prayer times, Athkar, and the Holy Quran with advanced AI support.

hero.title: Your path to Paradise starts here
hero.subtitle: Your comprehensive companion for worship, combining authenticity with modern technology.

prayer.title: Prayer Times
prayer.desc: Accurate alerts for every prayer based on your geographical location.

quran.title: Holy Quran
quran.desc: Read and listen with interpretation and translation in several languages.

athkar.title: Daily Athkar
athkar.desc: Fortify yourself with morning and evening remembrances and everything a Muslim needs.

location.title: Qibla & Mosques
location.desc: Advanced AR Qibla finder and nearby mosque discovery.

ai.title: Dialect-aware AI
ai.subtitle: The first AI-powered Islamic assistant that understands all Arabic dialects.
ai.egyptian: What do I say when leaving home? (Egyptian)
ai.gulf: When does Qiyam prayer start today? (Gulf)
ai.desc: Whether you speak Maghrebi, Egyptian, or Gulf, our smart assistant understands you and answers accurately.

footer.rights: All rights reserved © 2024 Tariq ila Al-Jannah
